summary: Completed testing of Session Join functionality for candidates. Backend: 6/6 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All features verified - booking visible in coaching page, Join button enabled within join window, clicking Join opens correct Google Meet link.
critical_code_review_comments: handleJoinSession function (CoachingPage.jsx lines 1363-1405) correctly calls check-in API and opens meet link in new tab
Check-in API (session_tracking.py lines 33-190) properly validates user, checks join window (10 min before to 15 min after), and returns meet_link
Join button UI (CoachingPage.jsx lines 2090-2117) correctly shows 'Join' or 'Rejoin' based on candidate_checked_in status
formatMeetingLink utility ensures proper https:// protocol prefix for meet links
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_session_join.py - Created test suite for session join functionality

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All session join features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Test booking created with meet_link field populated, session time set within join window
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session join functionality fully tested. Key flows: 1) Candidate logs in via /test-login, 2) Navigates to /dashboard/coaching?tab=sessions, 3) Sees booking in 'Upcoming Sessions', 4) Clicks 'Join Now' button when within join window (10 min before to 15 min after session), 5) Check-in API returns meet_link, 6) Meet link opens in new tab. Join window logic is in isSessionJoinable() function.

booking_visibility.description: Candidate can see upcoming booking in coaching page
booking_visibility.evidence: Booking appears under 'Upcoming Sessions' with mentor name, date, time

join_button_visibility.description: Join button is visible and enabled when session is joinable
join_button_visibility.evidence: Join Now button found, Visible: True, Enabled: True

join_button_click.description: Clicking Join button opens the meet link

meet_link_retrieval.description: Meet link is correctly retrieved from booking data
meet_link_retrieval.evidence: Check-in API returns meet_link from booking document

test_scenarios_covered: Get my bookings API returns test booking
Check-in API returns meet link when within join window
Session status API returns correct information
Booking has required fields (id, date, time_slot, status, mentor_name)
Join window calculation (10 min before to 15 min after session)
UI shows booking in Upcoming Sessions
Join Now button is visible and clickable
